nasb.text: The servant said to him, “Suppose the woman is not willing to follow me to this land; should I take your son back to the land from where you came?”

esv.text: The servant said to him, “Perhaps the woman may not be willing to follow me to this land. Must I then take your son back to the land from which you came?”

cnv.text: 僕人問亞伯拉罕：“如果那女子不願跟我到這地方來，我必須把你的兒子帶回你原出之地去嗎？”

ccb.text: 老总管问他：“如果那女子不肯跟我到这里来，我要把你儿子带回你的家乡吗？”

csbs.text: 那仆人对他说：“假如那女子不愿意随着我到这地来，那么我必须把你的儿子带回你离开的故土吗？”
